name: Mike Praught
abilities: ★ Keeper of Handicaps — holds the great ledger and locks in every man's strokes, adding one whenever he pleases (+1 for each extra body sleeping in your car). The draft, the trades, the team names — all cross his desk.
The Old Guard. Back-to-back Pairs Champion — '23 with Ryan, '24 with Adison — and perennial top-six; handicap whittled 18 → 13. Cares only for legacy and history, never the cash.
flavor: “Handicaps are locked in. You sandbaggers can start playing good golf now.”
caption: Mike Praught · Truffle Hogs 🐗
